title: Agent OS ROI review: memory freshness and contradiction handling
goal: Capture the ROI case for memory contradiction, freshness, and decay handling.
Keep Memory ownership distinct from Planning and Workspace composition.
scope: Issue #1115 ROI point 8: memory contradiction, freshness, and decay handling.
Stale notes, superseded traps, contradiction warnings, authority, affected paths, and invalidation triggers.
non_goals: Do not update memory notes in this review.
Do not use memory as issue tracking or active planning.

review_mode.review question: Would freshness and contradiction metadata make Agentic Memory safer as an anti-rediscovery layer?
review_mode.inputs inspected first: Issue #1115 body, memory index, startup memory consultation recommendation

review_method.commands used: uv run agentic-workspace start --task "Create one planning review artifact for each of the ten agent OS capability ROI points from issue #1115" --format json; Get-Content .agentic-workspace/memory/repo/index.md

findings.title: Memory needs freshness and contradiction signals to stay trustworthy
findings.summary: The memory index is clear that memory is anti-rediscovery, not a tracker or broad handbook. That boundary becomes stronger if notes can expose freshness, supersession, contradiction, affected paths, and invalidation triggers when routed into a task.
findings.evidence: Startup recommended reading the memory index without bulk-reading memory. The index says Memory is not a task tracker, issue mirror, or broad fallback handbook, and that loading should stay small. Issue #1115 identifies freshness/contradiction handling as the key next value for memory.
findings.risk if unchanged: Agents may over-trust stale memory, miss superseded guidance, or avoid memory because freshness and contradiction risk are invisible.
findings.suggested action: Create a child slice in Agentic Memory for freshness/contradiction metadata and Workspace route warnings, preserving Memory's anti-rediscovery boundary.
findings.promotion target: GitHub child issue under #1115; Agentic Memory with Workspace surfacing
findings.promotion trigger: Promote when stale or contradictory notes cause repeated wrong routing, or when memory route output needs authority/freshness warnings.
findings.post-remediation note shape: stub pointing to Memory freshness contract and route output

recommendation.promote: Good Memory-owned child slice when memory trust becomes the selected bottleneck.
recommendation.defer: Keep inactive behind higher-ROI task/proof/ownership slices.
recommendation.dismiss: Do not dismiss; memory trust is core to anti-rediscovery value.

retention.trigger: Memory freshness/contradiction work is promoted or explicitly dismissed.
retention.proof surface: Memory route/report output and memory validation.

validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
drift_log: 2026-05-24: Review record created from issue #1115 ROI point 8.
